rows.label: qev300241_MSG0002
rows.name:
It beckons me to gather up miranium
and embark on a new enterprise for
the benefit of NLA and its people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev300241_SEL0021
rows.name: Hold on to your miranium for now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev300241_MSG0004
rows.name:
Your hard work is appreciated.
I will see that it goes to
improving life in the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev300241_MSG0005
rows.name:
Hmm. I suppose it may be the
will of the Ovah that that
miranium be put to other uses.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev300241_MSG0006
rows.name:
Brave and loyal BLADE, please
bring to me 7,000 units of
miranium. No more. No less.[ST:wait ]
